name: @forgeax/bevy-iter-combinations
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `iter_combinations` example (an N-body gravity simulation where bodies attract and clump) — an ECS-front-door MOTION demo exercising the new queryCombinations pairwise query iterator (mapping Bevy's Query::iter_combinations_mut) driven by chained world.addSystem Update systems + createApp's auto-Time resource.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: iter-combinations demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: iter-combinations demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy iter_combinations reproduction
